homepage.highlights.fastBuild.descriptio.message: Provides both a full business scaffold and a minimal integration path so greenfield projects and legacy retrofits can get started in minutes.

homepage.highlights.aiFriendly.descripti.message: Includes a dedicated Developer and AI Navigation Guide with standardized prompt context so LLMs such as Trae and Copilot can understand the framework quickly.

homepage.highlights.extensibility.descri.message: Combines MQL and a Fluent DSL ORM with a complete plugin mechanism and SPI to support complex enterprise customization.

homepage.capabilities.mql.message: Metadata query language and Fluent DSL with seamless support for major relational databases such as MySQL, PostgreSQL, and Oracle.
homepage.capabilities.mql.description: Homepage capability card for MQL and ORM

homepage.capabilities.runtime.message: Separates runtime and design-time responsibilities to support hybrid low-code and pro-code development.
homepage.capabilities.runtime.description: Homepage capability card for runtime and designer

homepage.capabilities.auth.message: An independent authentication center that provides standard OAuth2 support and lightweight lite-login integration.
homepage.capabilities.auth.description: Homepage capability card for auth server

homepage.capabilities.plugin.message: Provides replaceable platform-level extension points around Meta, Security, and ORM.
homepage.capabilities.plugin.description: Homepage capability card for plugin and SPI

homepage.meta.title.message: Geelato Project - Enterprise Low-Code & Pro-Code Solutions

homepage.meta.description.message: More than documentation, this is a knowledge base for developers and AI to build complex business systems together. It covers Geelato Framework, AuthServer, and Message Center.

homepage.hero.description.line1.message: More than documentation, this is a knowledge base for developers and AI to build complex business systems together.

homepage.hero.description.line2.message: The project is built on three core pillars: {framework} for foundational architecture and modeling, {authServer} for unified authentication, and {message} for unified messaging.
homepage.hero.description.line2.description: Homepage hero second line with product pillars

homepage.paths.developer.description.message: Start from the scaffold or minimal integration path, learn the core MQL and ORM syntax, and deliver business CRUD and custom extensions quickly.

homepage.paths.architect.description.message: Focus on standalone Auth Server integration, Runtime/Designer architecture, security context, and high-availability deployment governance.

homepage.paths.ai.description.message: Use the navigation guide to quickly understand framework-specific concepts and context so agents can generate high-quality business code aligned with best practices.

homepage.bottom.title.message: Built for modern enterprise systems and AI-assisted development.
